COMPENDIUM-MERGER.App.Title: Compendium Merger
COMPENDIUM-MERGER.App.ScopeHint: Merges Item and Actor compendiums across nine categories: Items, Spells, Monsters, Vehicles, Species, Backgrounds, Classes (with Subclasses bundled in), Feats, and Monster Features (which also covers what official content labels "Creature Traits") — Actor characters/groups are the only things left alone and skipped. Merged Items are sorted into Weapons/Armor/Equipment/Consumables/Tools/Trade Goods/Treasure/Loot/Containers folders (Treasure holds art objects and gemstones; Trade Goods holds raw tradeable commodities), with a rarity sub-folder (Mundane/Common/Uncommon/Rare/Very Rare/Legendary/Artifact) under each except Trade Goods, Treasure, and Loot. Merged Spells are sorted into a folder per spell level, Merged Monsters into a folder per Challenge Rating or creature type (your choice below), and Merged Feats into Feats/Supernatural Gifts/Enchantments folders. Merged Vehicles, Species, Backgrounds, and Classes aren't sorted into sub-folders yet.
COMPENDIUM-MERGER.App.PriorityHint: Each category below has its own independent list of source compendiums and priority order — a source that's great for spells isn't necessarily the one you want winning for monsters. Check the ones to include per category and order them by priority: if the same name shows up in more than one checked compendium within a category, the one closer to the top wins. Drag isn't supported — use the arrows to reorder.
COMPENDIUM-MERGER.App.FilterEmptySources: Only show compendiums that contain at least one document of this content type (slower to load)
COMPENDIUM-MERGER.App.NoItemSources: No Item compendiums are available. Enable some under your world's Compendium Packs settings first.
COMPENDIUM-MERGER.App.NoActorSources: No Actor compendiums are available. Enable some under your world's Compendium Packs settings first.
COMPENDIUM-MERGER.App.RebuildWarning: Running the merge completely wipes and rebuilds the "Merged Items", "Merged Spells", "Merged Monsters", "Merged Vehicles", "Merged Species", "Merged Backgrounds", "Merged Classes", "Merged Feats", and "Merged Monster Features" compendiums from your checked sources. Any manual edits made directly inside those compendiums will be lost — edit the sources instead, then re-run.
COMPENDIUM-MERGER.App.MergeComplete: Merge complete: {items} items, {spells} spells, {monsters} monsters, {vehicles} vehicles, {species} species, {backgrounds} backgrounds, {classes} classes, {feats} feats, {monsterFeatures} monster features.
COMPENDIUM-MERGER.Warnings.NoSourcesChec: Check at least one source compendium in at least one category before running the merge.
COMPENDIUM-MERGER.Warnings.MergeFailed: The merge failed — check the browser console (F12) for details.
